text: Quantum Rick was one of the six members of the defunct Council of Ricks. In: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind, he along with the rest of the council accused Rick C-137 of the murders of 27 Ricks as well as the capture and torture of their Mortys. He along with the others apologized to C-137 after the later found the real killer (Evil Rick). In: The Rickshank Rickdemption The Citadel was teleported to a prison of the Galactic Federation by Rick. The other council members got killed by C-137 however the fate of Quantum Rick remains a mystery.
